name: transaction-third-mortgage
rationale: Third mortgage scenario: existing 1st ($380k Scotia) + existing 2nd ($85k private) + new 3rd mortgage request ($50k). Vienna's canonical fields support mortgage_position string-valued, but 3rd-mortgage support across the broader pipeline (combined-LTV math with TWO existing mortgages; risk classification at 3rd position) is undefined. Layer 3 product-design — does Vienna support 3rd mortgages, or is this out-of-scope?
notes: Single-event sequence. Fixture uses existing canonical fields (mortgage_position='3rd mortgage', existingFirstMortgageBalance for 1st only; 2nd mortgage info in extraText). Architecture-amendment risk: if 2nd-mortgage-balance needs canonical field, surface as matrix amendment.
